prompt: Напиши CLI-утилиту для пакетного переименования файлов в каталоге с dry-run планом.
expected_steps: clarify rename rule dry-run and apply behavior
create small CLI project scaffold with package module, README and tests
define contract for rename plan and path safety
implement apply mode that rejects path traversal
add tests with temporary files and CLI behavior
run project-scoped tests and produce usage example
acceptance_criteria: apply mode renames files inside target directory
all tests run from generated project root
